description: A square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is the recurring desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso, used as a generic visual instead of the subject's photo. A red diagonal banner in the top-right corner reads 'MIAMI' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif caps 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '2/10/2025 | Miami, FL.' The name appears large in white bold sans-serif: 'Dario Gonzalez.' Below is the white 'CRIME:' label with a bulleted charge 'Lewd/lascivious child abuse.' Bottom left has the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom right shows a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST.' This standardized agency propaganda card couples an anonymized handcuffs image with a named arrestee and an emphasized child-abuse charge to depict immigration detainees as predators and to justify removals. The target audience is the general public and enforcement supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Miami, FL; Dario Gonzalez; CRIME: Lewd/lascivious child abuse; MIAMI; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
